flows.name: todesktop build (Electron CLI)
flows.description: Developer runs `todesktop build` in their Electron repo

steps.label: invoke CLI
steps.detail: Developer runs `todesktop build`. Reads todesktop.json, validates against packages/cli/schemas/schema.json.

steps.label: getIdToken()
steps.detail: packages/cli/src/utilities/firestore.ts exchanges cached Firebase Auth credentials for an idToken to attach to all Function calls.

steps.label: prepareNewBuild()
steps.detail: Payload: {appId, appVersion, projectConfig, shouldCodeSign, versionControlInfo, breakpoints}. Returns buildId + signed upload URL.

steps.label: create build doc
steps.detail: users/{uid}/apps/{appId}/builds/{buildId} — status=preparing, snapshots the project config.

steps.label: PUT source.tar.gz
steps.detail: Signed URL upload of source tarball to s3://todesktop-source/{buildId}/source.tar.gz.

steps.label: kickOffBuild(buildId)
steps.detail: Marks the build doc ready and triggers the Azure Pipelines run.

steps.label: POST /pipelines/run
steps.detail: DevOps REST API call with build parameters (platform matrix, signing flags).

steps.label: spawn agent
steps.detail: Mac/Win/Linux agents start, install Node + @todesktop/desktopify.

steps.label: fetch source
steps.detail: Pulls source.tar.gz, extracts to the agent's workspace.

steps.label: build(appConfig)
steps.detail: Runs app-builder-lib targeting each platform. Produces .app / .exe / .AppImage artifacts.

steps.label: fetch signing cert
steps.detail: Pulls the customer's EV cert + Apple Developer ID from Key Vault.

steps.label: notarize macOS build
steps.detail: altool submission, polls until Apple returns the stapled ticket.

steps.label: sign Windows build
steps.detail: Signs the .exe using the customer's EV / OV certificate.

steps.label: upload artifacts
steps.detail: Writes signed installers + auto-update manifest to s3://todesktop-artifacts/{buildId}/.

steps.label: reportBuildStatus()
steps.detail: Callbacks the Function with success/failure + artifact URLs.

steps.label: update build doc
steps.detail: status=succeeded, artifactUrls, durationMs, logs. UI subscribes and reflects in realtime.

steps.label: mirror to edge
steps.detail: Copies the auto-update channel manifest to R2 so downloads hit the CDN.

flows.name: todesktop release (publish as latest)
flows.description: Developer marks a successful build as the new "latest" for end users

steps.label: invoke CLI
steps.detail: Developer runs `todesktop release --buildId=<id>`.

steps.label: publishRelease()
steps.detail: Validates the buildId belongs to this app and is in status=succeeded.

steps.label: update release pointer
steps.detail: users/{uid}/apps/{appId}.latestReleaseId = buildId. Bumps releasedAt.

steps.label: rewrite manifest
steps.detail: Writes /apps/{appId}/latest/{platform}.yml so installed clients see the new version.

steps.label: purge CDN cache
steps.detail: Invalidates download URLs so the next end-user check picks up the new release immediately.

flows.name: Installed app auto-update check
flows.description: End user launches an installed ToDesktop app

steps.label: GET /apps/{id}/latest/{platform}.yml
steps.detail: Electron-updater fetches the manifest from the R2-backed CDN at startup and every 10 minutes.

steps.label: edge origin pull
steps.detail: Cache miss falls through to R2 origin.

steps.label: GET installer.zip
steps.detail: If the manifest version > installed version, the runtime downloads the platform installer.

steps.label: apply update on restart
steps.detail: Squirrel/.app bundle update applied next launch. Telemetry pinged to functions/analysis.

flows.name: Invite a new user to an organization
flows.description: Org admin opens InviteUserForm in the dashboard

steps.label: submit invite form
steps.detail: InviteUserForm.tsx posts { email, role } to the createInvite cloud function.

steps.label: createInvite(email,role)
steps.detail: HTTPS callable function, authenticated via the admin's Firebase Auth idToken.

steps.label: write invite doc
steps.detail: invites/{token} — { orgId, email, role, createdBy, expiresAt }. Used by /accept-invite.

steps.label: send email
steps.detail: Postmark template 'org-invite' with one-time accept URL containing the token.

steps.label: open accept URL
steps.detail: Invitee opens https://app.todesktop.com/accept-invite?token=…

steps.label: acceptInvite(token)
steps.detail: Verifies token, attaches user to org with the stored role, deletes the invite doc.

flows.name: Stripe billing webhook
flows.description: Stripe POSTs a subscription.* event to the billing webhook

steps.label: POST /stripeWebhook
steps.detail: subscription.created | subscription.updated | invoice.paid. Verified with Stripe-Signature header.

steps.label: retrieve customer
steps.detail: Fetches the customer record to map metadata.uid back to a Firebase user.

steps.label: update subscription
steps.detail: users/{uid}.subscription — plan, status, currentPeriodEnd, seatCount.

steps.label: syncEntitlements()
steps.detail: If plan changed tier, kicks off custom-domain re-provisioning where applicable.
